goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should 'arrive by 21:45'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'monday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'sesame restaurant and bar'.
Make sure you get 'area', 'address', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to stansted airport and should arrive by 21:45
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on monday
Make sure you get price and travel time
You are also looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called sesame restaurant and bar
Make sure you get area, address, and phone number
